criteria_results.text: Electron window loads without error dialog
criteria_results.notes: App opened and UI rendered successfully after static-serving fix. No error dialog shown.

criteria_results.text: .als export opens correctly in Ableton Live
criteria_results.notes: Ableton rejected the .als file: 'Unsupported MinorVersion (11.0.11202) (at line 3, column 10)'. Template was generated with Live 11.3; user has Live 12 which expects MinorVersion in '12.0.NNNNN' format.

criteria_results.text: ChordPro preview renders chords and directives
criteria_results.notes: Preview shows lyric text only. Chords in [brackets] and directives in {braces} are stripped by server-side parseChordPro() which intentionally keeps only item.lyrics from ChordLyricsPair items. No client-side chord rendering exists.

criteria_results.text: Stamp preview highlights the line that will be timestamped
criteria_results.notes: User reports preview shows one line ahead of what actually gets stamped. The lyric-current div (class 'entering') shows cursor line; lyric-next shows cursor+1. UX is ambiguous — 'entering' suggests what is upcoming, but stamp goes to cursor. User interprets highlighted line as 'next' but it is actually 'current'. Needs UX clarification and possible label fix.

process_issues.description: The static file serving fix (routes.ts, index.ts, electron/main.ts) was implemented inline without a matching issue or acceptance criteria. The original Issue 1 scope was Electron wrapper; the static serving bug was a runtime defect discovered at smoke, not anticipated in the issue.
process_issues.detected_by: Smoke test revealed a completely untested production code path.

issues.description: acceptance-contract was never run before the original Issue 1 coding-agent work. No contract file exists at docs/ai/contracts/issue-1.json. All 4 smoke failures are C1 (missing contract) as a direct result.
project-state-updater was not dispatched after the static-serving fix was applied and verified. project-state.md was not updated to reflect the new fix.
issues.detected_by: No project-state-updater announce string in transcript after fix was applied.

failure_output: Unsupported MinorVersion (11.0.11202) (at line 3, column 10) — Ableton Live 12 rejected the generated .als file. Template XML: <Ableton MajorVersion="5" MinorVersion="11.0.11202" Creator="Ableton Live 11.3">
suggested_follow_up: Run acceptance-contract before any future coding-agent dispatch; the three smoke failures (MinorVersion, chord display, stamp UX) are all C1 — none had a contract test — meaning acceptance-contract would have caught them before implementation.
